channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tom Brady Shares Guidance for NFL Rookies and Welcomes No. 1 Pick Fernando Mendoza to the Raiders
item.description: Tom Brady, a seven-time Super Bowl champion and minority owner of the Las Vegas Raiders, shared a message of encouragement and realism for incoming NFL rookies during the 2026 NFL Draft. As dozens of ...

item.title: Nine-year-old South African chess prodigy raises funds to compete internationally
item.description: Nine-year-old Atlehang Malemane, a rising chess talent from South Africa, has successfully raised over R105,000 via a BackaBuddy crowdfunding campaign to participate in the Commonwealth Chess Champion...

item.title: Giants Strengthen Roster with Edge Rusher Arvell Reese and Offensive Lineman Francis Mauigoa in 2026 NFL Draft
item.description: During the 2026 NFL Draft, the New York Giants focused on reinforcing their roster in critical positions, selecting two highly rated college players. With the fifth overall pick, the Giants acquired O...

item.title: Urban Farming Thrives Amid the Busy Streets of Bonifacio Global City
item.description: Urban farming has begun to take root right in the bustling center of Bonifacio Global City (BGC), showcasing a sustainable approach to city living. The initiative, known locally as 'Tao Po,' integrate...

item.title: Ladakh launches village reservoirs under Project Him Sarovar to store glacier and snowmelt for year‑round use
item.description: Ladakh has started building a network of village reservoirs under a new initiative called Project Him Sarovar, aimed at tackling growing water stress in the Union Territory’s high‑altitude cold desert...

item.title: Lebanese Journalist Killed in Israeli Airstrike Amid Ceasefire Talks
item.description: In a tragic development, Lebanese authorities have strongly condemned Israel after an airstrike in southern Lebanon killed journalist Amal Khalil, aged 42, during a fragile 10-day ceasefire with Hezbo...

item.title: Why More Young People—Especially Women—Are Choosing Celibacy and Asexuality
item.description: The article explores a growing cultural shift in which some young people, particularly women, are increasingly choosing celibacy or identifying outside traditional sexual expectations. While online di...

item.title: Leonardo DiCaprio Responds Humorously to Nikki Glaser’s Golden Globes Joke
item.description: Comedian Nikki Glaser shared a humorous interaction with actor Leonardo DiCaprio following her jokes about his dating habits at this year's Golden Globes. During a recent appearance on Jimmy Fallon, G...

item.title: Jeraldine Blackman shares experience living with a heart condition while maintaining an active life

item.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly elections likely to see tight battles in several key constituencies
item.description: The article discusses how the upcoming Tamil Nadu Assembly elections are expected to witness closely fought contests in many constituencies across the state. It points out that while big‑ticket seats ...

item.title: B.C. gangster Jamie Bacon to reside in Edmonton following prison release amid safety concerns
item.description: Jamie Bacon, a notorious figure in British Columbia's criminal underworld, is set to live in Edmonton after his release from prison. Authorities have expressed concerns about the potential for violenc...

item.title: President Tinubu Congratulates 14-Year-Old Ekiti Student Oreofe for Winning 2026 African Spelling Bee Junior Title

item.title: Argument Escalates to Shooting at Mall of Louisiana, Leaving One Dead and Multiple Injured
item.description: A shooting erupted at the Mall of Louisiana in Baton Rouge on Thursday after an argument between two groups in the food court, resulting in one death and at least five injuries. Witnesses reported fra...

item.title: Balochistan's New Research Centre to Tackle Extremism and Support Youth
item.description: Balochistan's Chief Minister Sarfraz Bugti recently inaugurated the province's first research centre aimed at countering rising extremism. The Balochistan Centre of Excellence on Countering Violent Ex...

item.title: Lahore High Court rules fathers remain liable for child maintenance during ongoing trials
item.description: The Lahore High Court (LHC) has ruled that a father cannot avoid paying maintenance to his minor child while a family case is under trial, even if earlier proceedings are reopened. Justice Raheel Kamr...

item.title: Michael Jackson Biopic: The Cast and Their Remarkable Transformations Into Real-Life Figures
item.description: The upcoming film 'Michael', which chronicles the life and early career of Michael Jackson, is creating buzz not only for its storyline but for its casting choices and the striking resemblance between...

item.title: Carney indicates progress on U.S.-Canada trade issues possible with mutual concessions
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney stated that several U.S. trade irritants, including provincial bans on American liquor, can be addressed quickly if Canada’s concerns are also resolved. The discussions are ...
